description: Unpack a .docx into a pretty-printed XML directory; merges adjacent runs, simplifies redlines, and escapes smart quotes to XML entities so they survive editing.
rules: does not mutate the source .docx; writes a new unpacked/ dir under record_store
DOCX-only post-processing: merge adjacent runs + simplify same-author tracked changes
usage: Set DOCX_FILE (path to the .docx). Outputs: unpacked/ (XML tree) and unpack.log.
limitation: The vendored core imports defusedxml; if absent, the porter records the import error and exits 0 with an empty audit log (degraded). With defusedxml present it fully unpacks.
